tailored_resume.name: Alekha Mandalapu
tailored_resume.professional_summary: Experienced Senior Software Engineer specializing in cloud platform engineering and distributed AI systems with 5+ years building scalable infrastructure across GCP and Azure. Expert in designing high-performance microservices architectures, implementing containerized deployments using Kubernetes and Docker, and managing distributed data storage solutions with Spanner. Proven track record leading platform initiatives, implementing secure hybrid connectivity patterns, and optimizing infrastructure for high-throughput applications. Strong foundation in C++ system programming with hands-on experience in gRPC APIs, distributed system design, and multi-cloud platform operations supporting large-scale workloads.

bullets: Spearheaded the design and implementation of highly scalable platform services using C++ for core cloud infrastructure components across GCP environments
Architected and managed distributed data storage solutions leveraging GCP Spanner to ensure global consistency and high availability for platform workloads
Deployed and orchestrated containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes on GCP for streamlined and resilient platform operations
Developed high-performance gRPC microservices for inter-service communication, handling millions of API queries per second across distributed systems
Designed and implemented robust data ingestion pipelines using Flume for real-time processing of large-scale event streams and platform telemetry
Led design reviews and technical discussions with peers and stakeholders, guiding architectural decisions for critical platform features and infrastructure
Implemented robust API security measures and access controls, ensuring data integrity and compliance across distributed cloud environments
Optimized complex data structures and algorithms in C++ to enhance system efficiency and reduce latency for platform API responses
Performed deep-dive analysis and debugging of system issues, resolving critical production incidents impacting platform service quality
Contributed to comprehensive documentation and operational runbooks, facilitating knowledge transfer within platform engineering teams
Conducted rigorous code reviews for team members, enforcing best practices, testability, and adherence to platform engineering guidelines
Collaborated closely with product teams to define platform requirements and deliver innovative infrastructure features supporting business objectives
work_experience.technologies: C++, gRPC, GCP Spanner, GCP Compute Engine, Docker, Kubernetes, Flume, Git, JIRA

overall_recommendation: Strong technical foundation with relevant cloud and distributed systems experience, but needs enhancement in GenAI platform engineering terminology and missing critical contact information. The resume shows solid C++ and GCP experience that aligns well with infrastructure requirements, but would benefit from adding Terraform, observability metrics, and GenAI concepts where experience supports it. Priority should be on completing contact information and emphasizing platform/infrastructure engineering aspects of existing experience.
